Okay everybody, so we're ready. Awesome. Alright, so interest is basically very broken down protein. So it's protein in its final, instantly bioavailable form. So think about what protein is right? So if you eat a piece of chicken, right, you're chewing it, it goes down, it breaks down in your stomach, and then finally it moves its way to your gut and then gets absorbed as an amino acid into your bloodstream, right? What's the problem with that? Is one, it's really difficult to time digestion, right? Like it could take like two hours or six hours, it depends on what other things you eat, it's really hard to time that. Second, no one wants to eat a big piece of chicken before they come work out, right? So if you want to have protein in your bloodstream, that final bioavailable form, we got to do something different. So what Intra does is it gives you the final form of protein, this instantly bioavailable form, which is amino acids, right? Within 15 minutes, right? So you drink it in 15 minutes in your bloodstream. Now the reason this is a good thing is that it allows you to flood your system and pump your muscles full of exactly what you need and what your muscles need to recover and jump throughout the entire process. Does that make sense? Okay, so anyone here ever work started working out and then you get like ridiculously sore the next day, right? Are you going a long hike and you haven't done anything in a while? Right, okay. So the reason this is arguably the most important something is because the number one reason people fall off is because they feel they are too sore to come back, right? So this makes the transition back to exercise way less painful while also helping you maintain more lean body mass. That's the good stuff, right? That's the stuff that increases your metabolism, burns fat, etc, right? And this is all important because as you're decreasing your calories, that's the stuff that's at risk. So this is why this is so important, right? So you're going to take one scoop of this during your workout and workout days only. You don't need to drink this drink to get your recovery on while you're hanging out with the kids, right? So drink this only in your workout days and this takes the place of sugary drinks like Gatorade or Powerade, which will definitely not help you lose weight.
